## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeIngredient.isFat() method

Returns true if this is a fat ingredient. When true, fat-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isFat(): this is IRuntimeFatIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeFatIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimefatingredient.md)
